zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Marion Cornellia Braidfute於1276年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾拉明頓時，她的父親Hugh Braidfute - Earl of Lamington41歲，母親Mary Almour16歲。她和Sir William Wallace Guardian of Scotland至少有3個女兒。她去世於1297年5月在蘇格蘭藍納可爾藍納可享年21歲，埋葬在英國肯特格林維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Marion Cornellia Braidfute于1276年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾拉明頓时，她的父亲Hugh Braidfute - Earl of Lamington41岁，母亲Mary Almour16岁。她和Sir William Wallace Guardian of Scotland至少有3个女儿。她去世于1297年5月在苏格兰藍納可爾藍納可享年21岁，埋葬在英国肯特格林維其。

nameMeanings.name: Marion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

nameMeanings.name: Cornellia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin feminine form of the old Roman family name   Cornelius .  It was borne in the 2nd century  bc  by the mother of the revolutionary reformers  Tiberius  and  Gaius Sempronius Gracchus . Its use in England dates from the 17th century, when it was probably brought in by Dutch immigrants.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Marion Cornellia Braidfute was born in 1276, in Lamington, Lanarkshire, Scotland, her father, Hugh Braidfute - Earl of Lamington, was 41 and her mother, Mary Almour, was 16. She had at least 3 daughters with Sir William Wallace Guardian of Scotland. She died in May 1297, in Lanark, Lanarkshire, Scotland, at the age of 21, and was buried in Greenwich, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Marion Cornellia Braidfute est née en 1276, à Lamington, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Hugh Braidfute - Earl of Lamington, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Mary Almour, avait 16 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 filles avec Sir William Wallace Guardian of Scotland. Elle est décédée en mai 1297, à Lanark, Lanarkshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 21 ans, et a été enterrée à Greenwich, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Marion Cornellia Braidfute 1276 in Lamington, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Braidfute - Earl of Lamington 41 und ihre Mutter Mary Almour 16. Sie hatte mit Sir William Wallace Guardian of Scotland mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb im Mai 1297 im Alter von 21 Jahren in Lanark, Lanarkshire, Scotland und wurde in Greenwich, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Marion Cornellia Braidfute è nata il nel 1276 nel Lamington, Lanarkshire, Scotland, sua padre, Hugh Braidfute - Earl of Lamington, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Mary Almour, aveva 16 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figlie con Sir William Wallace Guardian of Scotland. Morì nel maggio 1297, nel Lanark, Lanarkshire, Scotland, all'età di 21 anni, e fu sepolta a Greenwich, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Marion Cornellia Braidfuteが1276年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアラミントンで生まれた時，父Hugh Braidfute - Earl of Lamingtonは41歳，母Mary Almourは16歳であった。彼女はSir William Wallace Guardian of Scotlandとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1297年5月にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアラナルクで21歳で死去し，イギリスケントグレエンウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Marion Cornellia Braidfute(이)가 1276년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 램잉턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Braidfute - Earl of Lamington(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Almour(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 Sir William Wallace Guardian of Scotland(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1297년 5월 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 랜아르크에서 21세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 그린위치에 묻혔다.

mn.Elderslie, Paisley Parish, Renfrewshire: Elderslie, Siorrachd Rinn Friù, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Marion Cornellia Braidfute nasceu em 1276, em Lamington, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Hugh Braidfute - Earl of Lamington, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Mary Almour, tinha 16 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Sir William Wallace Guardian of Scotland. Ela faleceu em maio de 1297, em Lanark, Lanarkshire, Scotland, com 21 anos, e foi sepultada em Greenwich, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Marion Cornellia Braidfute родилась в 1276 г. в местности лэмингтон, ланаркшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Hugh Braidfute - Earl of Lamington было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Mary Almour, 16. У неё было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Sir William Wallace Guardian of Scotland. Она умерла май 1297 г. в местности ланарк, ланаркшир, Шотландия в возрасте 21 год и была похоронена в местности гринвич, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Marion Cornellia Braidfute nació en 1276, en Lamington, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, Hugh Braidfute - Earl of Lamington, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Mary Almour, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con Sir William Wallace Guardian of Scotland. Murió en mayo de 1297, en Lanark, Lanarkshire, Scotland, a la edad de 21 años, y fue sepultada en Greenwich, Kent, Inglaterra.
